source_note: Extracted from the per-section tabs (CDS-A through CDS-J) of the commondataset.org Common Data Set Excel template. Row-metadata templates retain canonical question_numbers when provided by the source workbook. Visual-layout historical templates require a separate canonical overlay to cross-reference fields against the current Answer Sheet schema.
